8.reason: [Using a global variable 'height' leads to incorrect height tracking during traversal because it is shared across all recursive calls and modified in preorder traversal, causing wrong height values for leaf nodes.]

31.reason: [The height printed here is the global 'height', which does not represent the actual depth of the current node in the tree. The height should be stored per node or passed as a parameter during traversal.]
